context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements mDNS discovery for Shelly color bulbs on a JVM using JmDNS, including the critical non-loopback IPv4 bind requirement, correct interface filtering, service-name prefix filtering, and proper resource cleanup.

checklist.name: JmDNS library used
checklist.description: Uses javax.jmdns.JmDNS for mDNS discovery — not Avahi, jmDNS alternatives, or a raw multicast socket implementation

checklist.name: Explicit InetAddress bind
checklist.description: JmDNS.create() is called with an explicit InetAddress argument — does NOT use the no-argument JmDNS.create() form

checklist.name: Interface up/physical filter
checklist.description: NetworkInterface enumeration filters to interfaces that are isUp AND NOT isLoopback AND NOT isVirtual

checklist.name: Utun interface exclusion
checklist.description: Excludes network interfaces whose displayName starts with "utun" (VPN tunnel interfaces)

checklist.name: IPv4-only address filter
checklist.description: Filters InetAddress to non-loopback IPv4 addresses only: checks !isLoopbackAddress AND address length == 4 (or equivalent IPv4 check)

checklist.name: Correct mDNS service type
checklist.description: Queries the mDNS service type "_http._tcp.local." (not "_shelly._tcp.local." or any other type)

checklist.name: shellycolorbulb- prefix filter
checklist.description: Filters discovered services to those whose name starts with "shellycolorbulb-"

checklist.name: shellybulbduo- prefix filter
checklist.description: Also filters for services whose name starts with "shellybulbduo-" (not just shellycolorbulb-)

checklist.name: JmDNS closed after use
checklist.description: jmdns.close() is called after listing services to release the multicast socket

checklist.name: Returns IP strings
checklist.description: The discovery function returns a list of IP address strings (hostAddress values), not ServiceInfo objects or other types
